description: Create a new Activity log in farmOS Field Kit to document a livestock move on January 6, 2025. The log should include a quantity of 24 with the unit 'head'. In the notes, record: 'Rotational grazing move. Moved 24 Angus cow-calf pairs from North Pasture A (Section 12) to South Pasture B (Section 7). North Pasture A residual forage height: 3 inches. South Pasture B forage height at entry: 8 inches. Estimated 14 grazing days in South Pasture B. Next rotation planned January 20, 2025. Water tank checked and functioning.'
